Notice Of Motion To Compelling Timothy Clark'S Further Responses To Pltf'S Supplemental Request For Production Of Documents And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-19-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Douglas Provencher, Esq., appearing by telephone, for plaintiff and moving party: Creditors Trade Association
Shannon M. Erickson, Esq., for defendant and opposing party: Prospect Point Development LLC.

AFTER HEARING, TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association's motion to compel further responses to supplemental request for production of documents as to defendant Clark is Granted. The objections are overruled and stricken. The request for monetary sanctions is denied, compliance by april 15, 2008. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Attendance At Deposition And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-19-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Douglas Provencher, Esq., appearing by telephone, for plaintiff and moving party: Creditors Trade Association
Shannon M. Erickson, Esq., for defendant and opposing party: Prospect Point Development LLC.

AFTER HEARING, TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motion to compel attendance at deposition is Granted. The parties shall meet and confer as to scheduling the deposition at a mutually convenient time. Compliance by April 15, 2008. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $340 shall be paid on or before April 18, 2008. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion To Compelling Prospect Point Development, Llc'S Further Responses To Pltf'S Supplemental Request For Production Of Documents And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
